productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Grey Adizero Ghost Sports Shoes
description: Score those winning baskets in style with the adidas Adizero Ghost Basketball shoe. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and with absolute lightweight comfort, these shoes are poised to set you soaring.UpperSynthetic leather upper for maximum durability and lightweight comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand& rsquo s belief in performance High ankle for snug support to the lower leg Synthetic overlay at the back heel for enhanced back-foot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilation Meshed, padded tongue and collar for absolute breathable and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePU Midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded foot-bed for all day cushioned comfortOutsoleDurable non-marking TPU outsole with circular patterned grooves and herringbone grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Horizontal wave-like grooves on the medial forefoot and lateral heel for enhanced ease of movement and stabilityTorsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral movement Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
